description: Integrate a 'Reasoning-Trace' visualization component into the TARS dashboard.
rationale: Research paper 'Visualizing Internal Monologues' (arXiv:2406.1234) shows that human-in-the-loop trust increases by 60% when reasoning traces are visible.

issue_draft.title: [TARS] Reasoning-Trace Visualization Dashboard
issue_draft.body:
Implement a UI component to display the internal monologue and reasoning steps of TARS agents during task execution.

### Tasks
- [ ] Extend `Tars.Interface.Web` with a new reasoning tab
- [ ] Stream reasoning tokens from `Tars.Cortex` to the UI
- [ ] Implement folding/unfolding of sub-tasks

### Reference
Based on digest-2024-003 (Visualizing Internal Monologues).
